ddls:
CREATE TABLE "words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "word" TEXT /* The word itself */,
  "age_subject" TEXT /* Age group the word is associated with (e.g., young, adult) */,
  "word_category" TEXT /* Category of the word (e.g., noun, verb) */,
  "familiarity" REAL /* Familiarity score of the word */,
  "word_language" TEXT /* Language the word belongs to */,
  "word_origin" TEXT /* Origin or etymology of the word */,
  "word_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the word (if applicable) */,
  "word_registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the word was registered in the database */,
  "word_last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the word's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the frequency record */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word related to this frequency entry */,
  "written_frequency" REAL /* Written frequency of the word */,
  "noun_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the word as a noun */,
  "verb_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the word as a verb */,
  "spoken_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the word in spoken language */,
  "contextual_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the word in specific contexts (e.g., formal, informal) */,
  "regional_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the word in different regions or dialects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_frequencies_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metric record */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word related to this metric entry */,
  "derivational_entropy" REAL /* Entropy related to derivational forms of the word */,
  "inflectional_entropy" REAL /* Entropy related to inflectional forms of the word */,
  "number_simplex_synsets" INTEGER /* Number of simplex synsets for the word */,
  "number_complex_synsets" INTEGER /* Number of complex synsets for the word */,
  "syntactic_entropy" REAL /* Entropy related to the syntactic structure of the word */,
  "semantic_similarity" REAL /* Measure of semantic similarity to other words */,
  "word_complexity" REAL /* A measure of the word's complexity or difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_metrics_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phonetic_attributes" (
  "phonetic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for phonetic record */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word related to this phonetic entry */,
  "conspel_v" REAL /* Vowel consonant spell frequency */,
  "conspel_n" REAL /* Noun consonant spell frequency */,
  "conphon_v" REAL /* Vowel consonant phonetic frequency */,
  "conphon_n" REAL /* Noun consonant phonetic frequency */,
  "vowel_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of vowels within the word */,
  "consonant_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of consonants within the word */,
  "phonetic_length" INTEGER /* Length of the word in phonetic units */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phonetic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phonetic_attributes_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phonological_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for feature record */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word related to this feature entry */,
  "frication" TEXT /* Type of frication (e.g. frication, burst) */,
  "obstruent" TEXT /* Type of obstruent (e.g. voiced, voiceless) */,
  "voice" TEXT /* Voice quality associated with the word */,
  "phoneme_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of phonemes in the word */,
  "phoneme_stress_pattern" TEXT /* Stress pattern of the word */,
  "phoneme_duration" REAL /* Average duration of phonemes in the word */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phonological_features_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phonetic_frequencies" (
  "phonetic_freq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for phonetic frequency record */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word related to this phonetic frequency entry */,
  "frequency_initial_diphone" REAL /* Frequency of the initial diphone in the word */,
  "frequency_initial_diphone_word" REAL /* Frequency of the initial diphone in the word context */,
  "frequency_initial_diphone_syllable" REAL /* Frequency of the initial diphone in syllable context */,
  "frequency_final_diphone" REAL /* Frequency of the final diphone in the word */,
  "frequency_final_diphone_word" REAL /* Frequency of the final diphone in the word context */,
  "frequency_final_diphone_syllable" REAL /* Frequency of the final diphone in syllable context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phonetic_freq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phonetic_frequencies_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for word attribute record */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word related to this attribute entry */,
  "length_in_letters" INTEGER /* Length of the word in letters */,
  "family_size" REAL /* Size of the family of the word */,
  "mean_bigram_frequency" REAL /* Mean bigram frequency of the word */,
  "word_syllable_count" INTEGER /* Number of syllables in the word */,
  "word_rhyme_family" TEXT /* Rhyme family the word belongs to */,
  "word_part_of_speech" TEXT /* Part of speech of the word (e.g., noun, verb, adjective) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_attributes_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, linguist, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "user_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the word data */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the word was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the user leading the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_project_lead FOREIGN KEY ("project_lead") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
